plan.summary: Add a favicon helper and reusable ShortcutIcon component to replace inline initials tiles across 7 components, then add a greeting + live clock widget to the desktop view.

todo.description: Add `getFaviconUrl(url: string): string` to `lib/data.ts` — derive host from `new URL(normalizeUrl(url)).host` and return `https://icons.duckduckgo.com/ip3/${host}.ico` (wrap in try/catch returning empty string on failure).

Create `components/ShortcutIcon.tsx` as a client component accepting `name`, `url`, `color`, and optional `size`/`className` props; render favicon `` from `getFaviconUrl` over an initials-on-color background div (using `getInitials` + `color`), swap to initials via `onError` state.

Replace the inline initials `<div>` with `<ShortcutIcon name={...} url={...} color={...} />` in `components/DesktopView.tsx` and `components/Taskbar.tsx` and `components/StartMenu.tsx` and `components/CommandPalette.tsx` and `components/AppSheet.tsx` and `components/Window.tsx` and `components/MobileView.tsx`; import `ShortcutIcon` and remove now-unused `getInitials` imports where applicable.

Add a desktop greeting + live clock widget to `components/DesktopView.tsx` (md+ only via Tailwind `hidden md:block`): use `getGreeting()` from `lib/data.ts` for the greeting text and `useState` + `useEffect` with `setInterval(1000)` to drive a ticking `HH:MM` (or `HH:MM:ss`) clock; style subtle dark glassy (e.g., `bg-black/30 backdrop-blur border border-white/10 rounded-xl`).
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npx eslint` from the project root; fix any TypeScript or ESLint errors introduced by the new code.

acceptanceCriteria: GitHub and Portfolio shortcuts render favicon images from icons.duckduckgo.com in all 7 components when the network request succeeds.
If a favicon image fails to load, the ShortcutIcon falls back to the initials-on-color tile using `getInitials` and the shortcut's `color`.
DesktopView shows a greeting (from `getGreeting()`) and a live clock that updates every second, visible only on md+ breakpoints.
